narrative:
Tallmadge 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.5 percentage points.
